tools.name: admin.anonymize
tools.description: Activate/deactivate anonymization for a source.

tools.name: admin.apiKeyInfo
tools.description: Read API Key info.

tools.name: admin.apiStatus
tools.description: Prints the current status of the classifiers. A classifier name in apiStatus corresponds to a service name in apiServices.

tools.name: admin.apiUsage
tools.description: Print current API usage.

tools.name: admin.apiUsageHistory
tools.description: Print historical API usage.

tools.name: admin.apiUsageHistoryAggregate
tools.description: Print historical API usage (in an aggregated view, by service, by day/hour/min).

tools.name: admin.availableServices
tools.description: List of classification services and usage cost in Units per classification (default is 1=ONE Unit). Some API endpoints (ex. Corridor) combine multiple classifiers.

tools.name: admin.learnable
tools.description: Activate/deactivate learning from a source.

tools.name: admin.regions
tools.description: Print basic source statistics.

tools.name: admin.softwareVersion
tools.description: Get the current software version

tools.name: admin.taxonomyClasses
tools.description: Print the taxonomy classes valid for the given classifier.

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameCandidates
tools.description: Identify Chinese name candidates, based on the romanized name ex. Wang Xiaoming

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameCandidatesBatch
tools.description: Identify Chinese name candidates, based on the romanized name (firstName = chineseGivenName; lastName=chineseSurname), ex. Wang Xiaoming

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameCandidatesGenderBatch
tools.description: Identify Chinese name candidates, based on the romanized name (firstName = chineseGivenName; lastName=chineseSurname) ex. Wang Xiaoming.

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameGenderCandidates
tools.description: Identify Chinese name candidates, based on the romanized name ex. Wang Xiaoming - having a known gender ('male' or 'female')

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameMatch
tools.description: Return a score for matching Chinese name ex. 王晓明 with a romanized name ex. Wang Xiaoming

tools.name: chinese.chineseNameMatchBatch
tools.description: Identify Chinese name candidates, based on the romanized name (firstName = chineseGivenName; lastName=chineseSurname), ex. Wang Xiaoming

tools.name: chinese.genderChineseName
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a Chinese full name ex. 王晓明

tools.name: chinese.genderChineseNameBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 full names ex. 王晓明

tools.name: chinese.genderChineseNamePinyin
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a Chinese name in LATIN (Pinyin).

tools.name: chinese.genderChineseNamePinyinBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 Chinese names in LATIN (Pinyin).

tools.name: chinese.parseChineseName
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. 王晓明 -> 王(surname) 晓明(given name)

tools.name: chinese.parseChineseNameBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. 王晓明 -> 王(surname) 晓明(given name).

tools.name: chinese.pinyinChineseName
tools.description: Romanize the Chinese name to Pinyin, ex. 王晓明 -> Wang (surname) Xiaoming (given name)

tools.name: chinese.pinyinChineseNameBatch
tools.description: Romanize a list of Chinese name to Pinyin, ex. 王晓明 -> Wang (surname) Xiaoming (given name).

tools.name: general.nameType
tools.description: Infer the likely type of a proper noun (personal name, brand name, place name etc.)

tools.name: general.nameTypeBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely common type of up to 100 proper nouns (personal name, brand name, place name etc.)

tools.name: general.nameTypeGeo
tools.description: Infer the likely type of a proper noun (personal name, brand name, place name etc.)

tools.name: general.nameTypeGeoBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely common type of up to 100 proper nouns (personal name, brand name, place name etc.)

tools.name: indian.castegroupIndianFull
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely Indian name castegroup of a personal full name.

tools.name: indian.castegroupIndianFullBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely Indian name castegroup of up to 100 personal full names.

tools.name: indian.religion
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely religion of a personal Indian full name, provided the Indian state or Union territory (NB/ this can be inferred using the subclassification endpoint).

tools.name: indian.religionIndianFullBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely religion of up to 100 personal full Indian names, provided the subclassification at State or Union territory level (NB/ can be inferred using the subclassification endpoint).

tools.name: indian.subclassificationIndian
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely Indian state of Union territory according to ISO 3166-2:IN based on the name.

tools.name: indian.subclassificationIndianBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely Indian state of Union territory according to ISO 3166-2:IN based on a list of up to 100 names.

tools.name: japanese.genderJapaneseNameFull
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a Japanese full name ex. 王晓明

tools.name: japanese.genderJapaneseNameFullBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 full names

tools.name: japanese.genderJapaneseNamePinyin
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a Japanese name in LATIN (Pinyin).

tools.name: japanese.genderJapaneseNamePinyinBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 Japanese names in LATIN (Pinyin).

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameGenderKanjiCandidatesBatch
tools.description: Identify japanese name candidates in KANJI, based on the romanized name (firstName = japaneseGivenName; lastName=japaneseSurname) with KNOWN gender, ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameKanjiCandidates
tools.description: Identify japanese name candidates in KANJI, based on the romanized name ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameKanjiCandidates1
tools.description: Identify japanese name candidates in KANJI, based on the romanized name ex. Yamamoto Sanae - and a known gender.

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameKanjiCandidatesBatch
tools.description: Identify japanese name candidates in KANJI, based on the romanized name (firstName = japaneseGivenName; lastName=japaneseSurname), ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameLatinCandidates
tools.description: Romanize japanese name, based on the name in Kanji.

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameLatinCandidatesBatch
tools.description: Romanize japanese names, based on the name in KANJI

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameMatch
tools.description: Return a score for matching Japanese name in KANJI ex. 山本 早苗 with a romanized name ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameMatchBatch
tools.description: Return a score for matching a list of Japanese names in KANJI ex. 山本 早苗 with romanized names ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.japaneseNameMatchFeedbackLoop
tools.description: [CREDITS 1 UNIT] Feedback loop to better perform matching Japanese name in KANJI ex. 山本 早苗 with a romanized name ex. Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.parseJapaneseName
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. 山本 早苗 or Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: japanese.parseJapaneseNameBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. 山本 早苗 or Yamamoto Sanae

tools.name: personal.corridor
tools.description: [USES 20 UNITS PER NAME COUPLE] Infer several classifications for a cross border interaction between names (ex. remit, travel, intl com)

tools.name: personal.corridorBatch
tools.description: [USES 20 UNITS PER NAME PAIR] Infer several classifications for up to 100 cross border interaction between names (ex. remit, travel, intl com)

tools.name: personal.country
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country of residence of a personal full name, or one surname. Assumes names as they are in the country of residence OR the country of origin.

tools.name: personal.countryBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country of residence of up to 100 personal full names, or surnames. Assumes names as they are in the country of residence OR the country of origin.

tools.name: personal.diaspora
tools.description: [USES 20 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely ethnicity/diaspora of a personal name, given a country of residence ISO2 code (ex. US, CA, AU, NZ etc.)

tools.name: personal.diasporaBatch
tools.description: [USES 20 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely ethnicity/diaspora of up to 100 personal names, given a country of residence ISO2 code (ex. US, CA, AU, NZ etc.)

tools.name: personal.gender
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a just a fiven name, assuming default 'US' local context. Please use preferably full names and local geographic context for better accuracy.

tools.name: personal.gender1
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a name.

tools.name: personal.genderBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 names, detecting automatically the cultural context.

tools.name: personal.genderFull
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a full name, ex. John H. Smith

tools.name: personal.genderFullBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 full names, detecting automatically the cultural context.

tools.name: personal.genderFullGeo
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a full name, given a local context (ISO2 country code).

tools.name: personal.genderFullGeoBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 full names, with a given cultural context (country ISO2 code).

tools.name: personal.genderGeo
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of a name, given a local context (ISO2 country code).

tools.name: personal.genderGeoBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely gender of up to 100 names, each given a local context (ISO2 country code).

tools.name: personal.origin
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country of origin of a personal name. Assumes names as they are in the country of origin. For US, CA, AU, NZ and other melting-pots : use 'diaspora' instead.

tools.name: personal.originBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country of origin of up to 100 names, detecting automatically the cultural context.

tools.name: personal.parseName
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. John Smith or SMITH, John or SMITH; John.

tools.name: personal.parseNameBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. John Smith or SMITH, John or SMITH; John.

tools.name: personal.parseNameGeo
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. John Smith or SMITH, John or SMITH; John. For better accuracy, provide a geographic context.

tools.name: personal.parseNameGeoBatch
tools.description: Infer the likely first/last name structure of a name, ex. John Smith or SMITH, John or SMITH; John. Giving a local context improves precision.

tools.name: personal.religionFull
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely religion of a personal full name. NB: only for INDIA (as of current version).

tools.name: personal.religionFullBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely religion of up to 100 personal full names. NB: only for India as of currently.

tools.name: personal.subclassification
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely origin of a name at a country subclassification level (state or regeion). Initially, this is only supported for India (ISO2 code 'IN').

tools.name: personal.subclassificationBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely origin of a list of up to 100 names at a country subclassification level (state or regeion). Initially, this is only supported for India (ISO2 code 'IN').

tools.name: personal.usRaceEthnicity
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer a US resident's likely race/ethnicity according to US Census taxonomy W_NL (white, non latino), HL (hispano latino),  A (asian, non latino), B_NL (black, non latino). Optionally add header X-OPTION-USRACEETHNICITY-TAXONOMY: USRACEETHNICITY-6CLASSES for two additional classes, AI_AN (American Indian or Alaskan Native) and PI (Pacific Islander).

tools.name: personal.usRaceEthnicityBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer up-to 100 US resident's likely race/ethnicity according to US Census taxonomy. Output is W_NL (white, non latino), HL (hispano latino),  A (asian, non latino), B_NL (black, non latino). Optionally add header X-OPTION-USRACEETHNICITY-TAXONOMY: USRACEETHNICITY-6CLASSES for two additional classes, AI_AN (American Indian or Alaskan Native) and PI (Pacific Islander).

tools.name: personal.usRaceEthnicityZiP5
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer a US resident's likely race/ethnicity according to US Census taxonomy, using (optional) ZIP5 code info. Output is W_NL (white, non latino), HL (hispano latino),  A (asian, non latino), B_NL (black, non latino). Optionally add header X-OPTION-USRACEETHNICITY-TAXONOMY: USRACEETHNICITY-6CLASSES for two additional classes, AI_AN (American Indian or Alaskan Native) and PI (Pacific Islander).

tools.name: personal.usZipRaceEthnicityBatch
tools.description: [USES 10 UNITS PER NAME] Infer up-to 100 US resident's likely race/ethnicity according to US Census taxonomy, with (optional) ZIP code. Output is W_NL (white, non latino), HL (hispano latino),  A (asian, non latino), B_NL (black, non latino). Optionally add header X-OPTION-USRACEETHNICITY-TAXONOMY: USRACEETHNICITY-6CLASSES for two additional classes, AI_AN (American Indian or Alaskan Native) and PI (Pacific Islander).

tools.name: social.phoneCode
tools.description: [USES 11 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country and phone prefix, given a personal name and formatted / unformatted phone number.

tools.name: social.phoneCodeBatch
tools.description: [USES 11 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country and phone prefix, of up to 100 personal names, detecting automatically the local context given a name and formatted / unformatted phone number.

tools.name: social.phoneCodeGeo
tools.description: [USES 11 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely phone prefix, given a personal name and formatted / unformatted phone number, with a local context (ISO2 country of residence).

tools.name: social.phoneCodeGeoBatch
tools.description: [USES 11 UNITS PER NAME] Infer the likely country and phone prefix, of up to 100 personal names, with a local context (ISO2 country of residence).

tools.name: social.phoneCodeGeoFeedbackLoop
tools.description: [CREDITS 1 UNIT] Feedback loop to better infer the likely phone prefix, given a personal name and formatted / unformatted phone number, with a local context (ISO2 country of residence).

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
